ground_truth.title: Online Tuition and Financing | Liberty University
ground_truth.main_content:
Liberty University Online Tuition and Fees

Consistent Tuition Rates for a Decade – Affordable Online Education

Clear Costs, Strong Values – See the Difference at Liberty

As a nonprofit institution, Liberty University strives to keep costs affordable for you. Most of our online tuition rates rank in the top 35% for affordability for 2025 when compared to our leading online competitors, and online undergraduate tuition rates have been frozen for the last 10 years!

Undergraduate Full-time $390 per hour
Part-time $455/hour
Military $250/hour

Graduate Full-time $580 per hour
Part-time $645/hour
Military $290/hour

Seminary Block Rate $2,850 per semester
Graduate Military $2,850 /semester
Doctoral Military $2,850 /semester

Doctorate Full-time $610 per hour
Part-time $675/hour
Military as low as $375 /hour

The above figures are general rates. For more specific program rates, please see the detailed Tuition Rates and Fees for 2025-2026 below.

Full-Time Per Hour Rate

Undergraduate – $390
R.N.-B.S.N. and R.N.-B.S.N.-M.S.N. – $330
B.S.N.-M.S.N. (Dual Degree)¹ – $330
Master's Programs (unless price otherwise noted) – $580
M.S. in Biomedical Sciences² – $605
M.Ed. and M.A. in Teaching Programs³ – $430
School of Divinity Master's Programs – $2,850 block rate
School of Divinity D.Min., Th.M., and Ph.D. Programs⁴ – $2,850 block rate
Ed.S. and Doctorate Programs – $610
D.N.P. – Psych. Mental Health Nurse Practitioner (Post-MSN and Post-BSN)⁵ – $850
Post-Grad Certificate in Psych Mental Health⁵ – $850
Military Undergraduate – $250
Military Master School of Divinity – $2,575 block rate
Military Graduate – $290
Military Ed.D.and Ed.S.Programs⁶ – $375
Military D.Min.: Pastoral Counseling⁶ – $2,800 block rate
Military School of Divinity Th.M Program – $2,575 block rate
Military School of Divinity D.Min. Programs – $2.800 block rate
Military Grad. to Doctoral tuition⁷ – $375
Technology Fee⁸ – $349 per semester
Book and Online Content Fees – $636*

Part-Time Per Hour Rate

Undergraduate – $455
R.N.-B.S.N. and R.N.-B.S.N.-M.S.N. – $330
B.S.N.-M.S.N. (Dual Degree)¹ – $330
Master's Programs (unless price otherwise noted) – $645
M.S. in Biomedical Sciences² – $605
M.Ed. and M.A. in Teaching Programs³ – $645
School of Divinity Master's Programs – $410
School of Divinity D.Min, Th.M, and Ph.D. Programs – $410
Ed.S. and Doctorate Programs – $675
D.N.P. – Psych. Mental Health Nurse Practitioner (Post-MSN and Post-BSN)⁵ – $850
Post-Grad Certificate in Psych Mental Health⁵ – $850
Military Undergraduate – $250
Military Master School of Divinity – $290
Military Graduate – $290
Military Ed.D.and Ed.S.Programs⁶ – $375
Military D.Min.: Pastoral Counseling⁶ – $375
Military School of Divinity Th.M Program – $290
Military School of Divinity D.Min. Programs – $375
Military Grad. to Doctoral tuition⁷ – $375
Technology Fee⁸ – $349 per semester
Book and Online Content Fees – $636*
